response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the search matches, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Do not perform or imply a mutation without a later explicit confirmation.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call inventory_search, inventory_availability, and inventory_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the stockroom brief, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: search Warehouse C for "Thermal Label Rolls"; check whether "Thermal Label Rolls" is available on 2026-10-10 in Warehouse C; and list active items in Warehouse C. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. These calls are read-only. If a later change seems useful, describe it but wait for explicit confirmation before using a mutating tool.
